title: Western Digital Corporation (WDC) Barclays Global Technology Conference (Transcript)
text: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC ) Barclays Global Technology Conference December 6, 2023 11:05 AM ET Company Participants Wissam Jabre - CFO David Goeckeler - CEO Conference Call Participants Thomas O'Malley - Barclays Bank Thomas O'Malley Perfect. Good morning, everyone.
